top_signals.title: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
top_signals.summary: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
